title: Guidance on the regulatory enrolment process for medical devices: Transmission via CESG - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance on the regulatory enrolment process for medical devices: Transmission via CESG
- Regulatory enrolment process
- Naming conventions, folder structure
- Transmission via CESG
- Important considerations
- Contacts, other resources
All regulatory transactions must be  validated according to the Validation rules for regulatory transaction filed in  non-eCTD format before filing.
Transactions that fail validation will not  be accepted.
All regulatory transactions using the REP must be sent to Health Canada  via the CESG. Before using  the CESG, stakeholders must register as a trading partner.
For information on how to become a trading  partner and how to send transactions, refer to the CESG information page.
